title: Chania, Crete — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Chania, Crete: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Chania is a city in Crete with a population of 108,642. Western Crete’s crown jewel with a Venetian harbor, lighthouse, and stunning mountain backdrop.
